title: Ship identification: Iranian shadow fleet tanker GLORY STAR tracked loading crude at Kharg Island with spoofed AIS
summary: Maritime OSINT expert TheRealShipDude identified Iranian shadow fleet tanker GLORY STAR (IMO 9287654) loading crude oil at Kharg Island while broadcasting false AIS position 300nm away, part of ongoing sanctions evasion operations.
contents:
# Iranian Shadow Fleet Tanker Identified Loading at Kharg Island

## Vessel Identification
Maritime OSINT analyst TheRealShipDude identified an Iranian shadow fleet tanker conducting sanctions evasion operations.

## Vessel Details
- **Current name**: GLORY STAR
- **IMO**: 9287654
- **Previous names**: OCEAN PEARL (2024), STAR VENTURE (2023)
- **Type**: Aframax crude oil tanker
- **DWT**: 105,000
- **Flag**: Tanzania (flag of convenience)
- **Management**: Front company registered in Sharjah, UAE
- **Beneficial owner**: Traced to NITC-affiliated entity through 3 shell companies

## Current Activity
- Loading crude oil at Kharg Island, Iran's primary oil export terminal
- AIS transponder broadcasting false position 300nm southeast (near Fujairah)
- Satellite imagery confirms actual position at Kharg loading berth
- Expected to conduct ship-to-ship transfer to Chinese-flagged receiver

## Sanctions Status
- Vessel not yet designated by OFAC despite Iranian oil trade involvement
- Renamed twice in 18 months to evade identification
- Insurance coverage from unknown provider (likely Russian or self-insured)

## Pattern Analysis
This vessel represents one of approximately 45 aging tankers in the Iranian shadow fleet, collectively moving an estimated 1.5 million barrels per day of Iranian crude to Asian buyers.
